content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P.O. Box 807 • 428 J Street • Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

August 8, 2002

Howard Laks, AIA
1545 Twelfth Street
Santa Monica, CA 90401

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-02-211

Dear Mr. Laks:

This letter is in response to your request for advice regarding the provisions of the Political Reform Act (the “Act”).¹ You requested written confirmation of advice you received from the legal division. It is the Commission’s policy not to provide confirmation of verbal advice.

Further, since your question has already been addressed in two prior letters,² pursuant to regulation 18329(c)(4)(G), rendering further advice or informal assistance would be inappropriate or otherwise not in the public interest. You may wish to consult with your city attorney regarding these prior letters. However, you may request reconsideration of advice provided to you that was incorrect, or based on changed circumstances.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

[Signature]
Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

LM:jww:jg
I:\AdviceLtrs\02-211

¹ Government Code sections 81000 – 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
² See Laks Advice Letter, No. A-02-155 and Laks Advice Letter, No. A-02-195. Specifically see Laks Advice Letter, No. A-02-195, page 1 and page 5. See generally, Laks Advice Letter, No. A-02-155, at page 4.
